overall.description: Spider-Man walks through a nighttime urban environment in a video game, moving along sidewalks, crossing streets with police presence, and passing under a large concrete overpass. The scene features autumn foliage, street lighting, and various city elements like parked cars and graffiti-covered vans.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with brick storefronts and autumn trees

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks steadily along the sidewalk next to a brick building, approaching an intersection with street lights and parked cars visible

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking past carrying a shopping bag

entered.detail: red brick building with arched windows and metal security gates
tree with yellow autumn foliage illuminated by warm streetlight
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light on the scene
dark colored sedan parked at the curb
metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk at night, passing by a red brick building with metal security gates on the left. The street is lined with autumn trees and parked cars, with pedestrians occasionally walking past in the opposite direction. Warm street lighting illuminates the scene as he approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and police presence

events.description: Spider-Man steps from sidewalk onto the striped crosswalk to cross the street
police car with flashing emergency lights is visible at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses the street at the crosswalk, moving between waiting pedestrians and passing near police vehicles

notable_agents.action: white police sedan with flashing red and blue lights stopped at intersection
police officer standing near the crosswalk observing traffic

entered.detail: white NYPD police sedan with flashing emergency lights
white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on asphalt
traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red light
elevated highway or train overpass spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses the street at a well-lit intersection, moving across the white striped crosswalk. A police car with flashing lights is parked on the right side of the road near a police officer, while traffic waits at the red light. The elevated overpass structure becomes visible ahead as he moves from the sidewalk into the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated overpass with concrete support pillars

events.description: Spider-Man moves from open intersection into the covered area beneath the overpass
Spider-Man passes the graffiti-covered van and continues under the overpass

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continues walking under the overpass, passing a graffiti-covered delivery van and moving between large concrete support pillars

notable_agents.action: man standing near the white van looking at his phone

entered.detail: white delivery truck with green graffiti art and text painted on the side
massive concrete support columns for the elevated highway above
orange and white striped construction barriers near the building entrance
black garbage bags piled on the sidewalk near the building

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks beneath the elevated overpass where the sky is mostly blocked by the concrete structure above. He passes a white delivery van covered in green graffiti on the right, and walks alongside massive concrete support pillars. The lighting becomes dimmer under the overpass, with construction barriers and trash bags visible near the brick building entrance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime city street that transitions from a warm, lit sidewalk into the dim shadow of a concrete overpass. It begins with Spider-Man walking past a red brick building and autumn trees, moving through the glow of street lighting as pedestrians pass by. As he reaches an intersection, the camera follows him across a white striped crosswalk, passing a police officer and a patrol car with flashing lights. The scene then shifts as he moves away from the open intersection and enters the oppressive shade beneath a massive elevated structure. Finally, the lighting dims further as he walks past concrete support pillars and a graffiti-covered delivery van, passing construction barriers and trash bags near a brick entrance.
